name: CNX Gas Corporation
description: CNX Gas Corporation is an independent natural gas exploration, development, and production company operating primarily in the Appalachian Basin. The company focuses on the extraction of coalbed methane and shale gas, particularly from the Marcellus and Utica Shale formations. Formerly a subsidiary of CONSOL Energy, CNX Gas Corporation manages extensive natural gas reserves and production facilities, providing clean-burning energy resources to markets across the United States.
